title: Celeriac Purée with Black Truffle & Crispy Pancetta
summary: Creamy celeriac with salty pancetta and truffle. A seriously indulgent side dish for special occasions.

method.description: Peel and cube the celeriac and potatoes.
In a large pot set over a high heat, combine the celeriac, potatoes, and stock. Bring to a boil, then simmer until tender (about 20 mins).
Drain the vegetables and return them to the pot. Add butter and cream, and use an immersion blender to purée until smooth. Season with salt and white pepper, then stir in the truffle oil.
Dice the pancetta. In a small pan, cook the diced pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Drain on paper towels.
Spoon the celeriac purée onto a serving plate, top with crispy pancetta, and garnish with shaved black truffle (if using – feel free to skip this).

chefs.name: Laurent Dagenais
chefs.summary:
Born and raised in Montreal, Dagenais is a chef by training who worked in the restaurant industry for almost a decade before a snowboarding accident changed his trajectory. “A decade ago my career took a turn that I would have never predicted,” explained Dagenais. “Breaking my arm put my cooking life on hold and that's why, in the midst of the pandemic, I started making videos on the internet.”
 
It was these videos that changed his life, making him an instant social media phenomenon. Reaching over 4+ million followers across his channels, Dagenais' main goal is to share his love of food and inspire people to get in to the kitchen more often.
